input.subject: 2BR showing
input.body: Hi, is the 2 bedroom apartment on Maple Street still available? I can tour tomorrow afternoon.

result.reason: Standard leasing inquiry regarding apartment availability and scheduling a tour.

input.subject: Leak under sink
input.body: There is water leaking under my kitchen sink and it is getting worse. Can someone come today?

result.reason: The message describes an active water leak, which constitutes a maintenance emergency requiring immediate staff intervention.

input.subject: Voucher question
input.body: Do you accept housing vouchers or Section 8? I want to apply if that is okay.

result.reason: Inquiries regarding fair housing and voucher acceptance require human oversight to ensure compliance with local regulations and internal policies.

input.subject: Invoice follow up
input.body: Following up on invoice 4021 for the lock repair. Can you confirm when payment will be sent?

result.reason: This is a payment inquiry from a vendor, which requires staff confirmation of invoice status and payment processing.

input.subject: Thanks
input.body: Thanks, I submitted the application and will wait for the next step.

result.reason: The message is a routine follow-up confirming application submission and does not require manual intervention.

input.subject: Attorney
input.body: My attorney told me to put this in writing. I am going to sue if the mold is not handled immediately.

result.reason: The message explicitly mentions an attorney, legal action, and a habitability issue (mold) that could lead to litigation.

input.subject: Weekly activity summary
input.body: System generated report for leasing activity.

result.reason: The message is an automated system report for internal property management and does not require a customer-facing response.

input.subject: Pet policy
input.body: I have an emotional support animal. What documents do you need?

result.reason: Inquiries regarding emotional support animals involve fair housing regulations and legal documentation requirements, which require human staff assessment.

input.subject: Parking
input.body: Is parking included with the apartment? Also, is there laundry in the building?

result.reason: This is a routine leasing inquiry regarding building amenities.

input.subject: No heat
input.body: The heat has been off since last night and it is very cold in the unit.

result.reason: The report of no heat in a unit during cold weather constitutes a maintenance emergency requiring immediate staff intervention.
